text.title: Architecture Repo Scaffolding Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: `fitness/` contains markdown bullets about goals; CI never measures them.
antipattern.fix: Convert each goal to a CI script + pin a numeric threshold.

antipattern.symptom: `reviews/cadence.yml` has next-review date 14 months ago; ADRs are stale.
antipattern.root-cause: No owner assigned, no calendar reminder.
antipattern.fix: Make `reviews/cadence.yml` a required CI gate that fails when overdue.

antipattern.symptom: Each ADR has a different shape; cannot diff consequences across decisions.
